message:
test: add comprehensive unit tests for discord, stripe, and telegram connectors

Discord connector (error.rs + types.rs, ~1,454 lines):
- Display trait coverage for all DiscordError variants (Api, Http,
  InvalidConfig, Timeout, RateLimited, Serialization, WebSocket)
- From<T> conversions and FcpError mapping verification
- Clone, Debug, PartialEq on all public types (Guild, Channel, Message,
  Embed, User, Role, Permission, Webhook)
- Serde roundtrips for config, request, and response types
- Edge cases: empty collections, None fields, boundary values

Stripe connector (error.rs + types.rs, ~764 lines):
- All StripeError variant Display messages (Api, Authentication,
  CardDeclined, InvalidRequest, RateLimited, NetworkError)
- Error code extraction and HTTP status mapping
- Customer, Subscription, PaymentIntent, Price, Invoice types
- Webhook event parsing and signature verification types
- Currency and amount formatting edge cases

Telegram connector (client.rs + types.rs, ~1,107 lines):
- TelegramError Display/Debug for Api, InvalidChatId, Http, Timeout,
  Serialization, FileTooBig, MessageTooLong variants
- From trait conversions and error code mapping
- Message, Chat, User, Update, InlineKeyboard types
- Document, Photo, Audio, Video media attachment types
- Bot command parsing and callback query handling
- Serde roundtrips with nested optional fields

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
